#### Shape.hs — label(function), area(method), Geometry(module), Shape(interface), Circle(struct), +1 more

```haskell
1	-- Domain type class + a concrete shape for the haskell-small fixture.
2	module Geometry where
3	
4	class Shape a where
5	  area :: a -> Double
6	
7	data Circle = Circle Double
8	
9	label :: Circle -> String
10	label (Circle _) = "circle"
11	
12	instance Shape Circle where
13	  area (Circle r) = r * r * 3
```

#### App.hs — run(function), App(module)

```haskell
1	-- Application module exercising import + cross-module call resolution.
2	module App where
3	
4	import Geometry
5	
6	run :: Double -> Double
7	run radius = area (Circle radius)
```
